jd.title: Chief Financial Officer

requirements.text: 15+ years of progressive finance leadership experience
Experience as CFO, VP Finance, or Finance Director at a high-growth technology company
Deep understanding of fintech regulatory landscape (FCA, PRA, ECB)
Experience managing finance teams of 50+ people across multiple geographies
Track record of leading IPO preparation or major fundraising rounds ($100M+)
CPA, ACA, ACCA, or equivalent professional qualification
Experience with treasury management and FX risk in multi-currency environments
Experience with IFRS and US GAAP dual reporting
Board-level presentation and investor relations experience

responsibilities: Lead all finance functions including FP&A, accounting, tax, treasury, and investor relations
Prepare company for potential IPO including financial controls, SOX readiness, and auditor relationships
Manage regulatory capital requirements and compliance with FCA/PRA standards
Build and scale finance team across London, Dublin, and Singapore offices
Present quarterly financial results to the board and investors
Drive strategic planning and capital allocation across business units

expected_output.summary: Finance executive with 18 years of progressive leadership across fintech, banking, and technology sectors. As VP Finance at TransferWise (now Wise), led finance team through IPO preparation and direct listing on LSE. Managed 65-person global finance team across 4 offices with P&L oversight exceeding $400M. ACA qualified with deep expertise in FCA/PRA regulatory compliance, multi-currency treasury, and IFRS reporting.

experience.title: VP Finance
bullets: Led 65-person global finance team across London, Tallinn, Singapore, and New York offices
Directed IPO preparation for Wise's direct listing on LSE (July 2021, $11B valuation)
Established SOX-equivalent internal controls and audit committee processes for public company readiness
Managed treasury operations across 50+ currencies with daily FX exposure exceeding $5B
Presented quarterly results to board of directors and 200+ institutional investors

experience.title: Finance Director
bullets: Built finance function from 5 to 25 people during Series C through Series E growth ($300M raised)
Managed FCA regulatory capital reporting and PRA liquidity requirements
Implemented financial planning and budgeting processes supporting 100% YoY revenue growth
Coordinated external audit processes with Deloitte and managed investor due diligence

experience.title: Senior Manager — Financial Services Audit
bullets: Led audit engagements for FTSE 250 financial services clients including Barclays and Standard Chartered
Managed teams of 15-20 across complex IFRS reporting engagements
Developed deep expertise in banking regulatory reporting and capital adequacy

experience.title: Audit Associate
bullets: Performed financial statement audits for mid-cap technology and financial services clients
Completed ACA qualification while working full-time

certifications: ACA — Institute of Chartered Accountants in England and Wales (ICAEW)
education: BSc Accounting & Finance — University of Manchester (2003-2006)

deliberate_flaws: MBA part-time not full-time from top-tier

provenance.notes: Synthetic persona and JD. JD style modeled from real Greenhouse/Lever postings. Expected output and cloud_skills are AI-generated. 4/8 scorecard checks (jd_coverage, no_fabrication, metrics_preserved, no_fabricated_skills) evaluate AI vs AI reference. 4/8 checks (factual_preservation, word_count, ats_structure, action_verbs) are structurally valid regardless.
